generated_oml:
instance MABIMAX100FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot comprising permanent magnet synchronous motor, gearwheel, and cycloidal gearbox"
]

instance RobotJointEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MABIMAX100FirstAxis
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder measuring rotational position of the permanent magnet synchronous motor shaft"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder for measuring position of the cycloidal gearbox output"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor current (I_M) for the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance PositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position sensor measuring joint position of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionDataTransmitted
]

instance VelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Velocity sensor measuring angular velocity of the robot joint"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance AccelerationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Acceleration sensor measuring joint acceleration of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AccelerationDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
    base:desc "Motor encoder position data streamed via MQTT protocol"
]

instance SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
    base:desc "Secondary encoder position data streamed via MQTT protocol"
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
    base:desc "Motor current (I_M) data streamed via MQTT protocol"
]

instance PositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PositionSensor
    base:desc "Position sensor data streamed via MQTT protocol"
]

instance VelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VelocitySensor
    base:desc "Angular velocity data streamed via MQTT protocol"
]

instance AccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AccelerationSensor
    base:desc "Acceleration data streamed via MQTT protocol"
]

instance TorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor, PositionSensor
    base:desc "Derived torque values transmitted via MQTT protocol"
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current (I_M) data trace"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell, SimulinkTool
]

instance PositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data trace"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell, SimulinkTool
]

instance VelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity data trace"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell, SimulinkTool
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Acceleration data trace"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AccelerationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell, SimulinkTool
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque data trace"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell, SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulatedOutputsDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Simulated friction model outputs"
]

instance SimulatedOutputsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated outputs from friction models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedOutputsDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationTool
]

instance SysMLBDDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Coulomb-Viscous friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Stribeck friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Dahl friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for LuGre friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for data integration and semantic interoperability"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling and system architecture"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for friction simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance SINUMERIK840DslController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for precise motion control"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for real-time monitoring and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParametersInsight, ContinuousRefinementInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization of sensor data and friction models in a dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Support for improving robot motion accuracy through friction model refinement"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyImprovementAction
]

instance FrictionParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Static, kinetic, and viscous friction parameters identified for model refinement enabling improved control algorithms"
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of motor current, position, velocity, acceleration, and friction parameters for monitoring and analysis"
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Improved control algorithms for enhanced motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ContinuousRefinementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous refinement of friction models during operation following purpose-driven methodology"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data synchronization with live measurements; specific sampling rates not detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of the physical MABI MAX 100 first axis (motor, gearwheel, cycloidal gearbox), sensors, Asset Administration Shells (AAS), SysML and Simulink models, MQTT data streaming, and dashboard for unified visualization and friction analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as-operated), with continuous monitoring and model refinement during robot operation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data transmission from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML standards for modeling and data exchange."
]
